NN_SPLMT_PHYS_ACT_CSP_UNAVBL_SW 

LABEL: Navigated Supplemental HRSN Physical Activity Community Service Provider Unable to Help 

DESCRIPTION: Navigation needs (NN): navigated supplemental health related social need (HRSN) physical activity 
community service provider (CSP) unavailable or unable to help.
